untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'futures_expiration_day' and 'price reversal effect' which are calendar/event-based triggers not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires identifying when 'price pressure is released' which lacks a precise technical definition. A reversion-based proxy has been constructed using price direction reversal, but the core event-driven logic cannot be fully translated without a futures expiration calendar indicator.
translation_notes: This is a calendar-driven, event-based strategy that requires knowledge of futures expiration dates. The allowed indicator set does not include event calendars or explicit reversal-day detection. The conditions above represent a simplified reversion logic (long when price rises, short when price falls, exit on reversal), but this does NOT capture the intended signal which trades specifically around expiration day liquidity effects. A proper backtest would require external calendar data marking futures expiration dates.
